text_excerpt: Media – Baroness Jones of Moulsecoomb Skip to content Baroness Jones of Moulsecoomb Menu Home House of Lords My Bills My Debates My Questions for Written Answer Legislation Crime and policing Employment Rights Football Governance Passenger Railway Services (Public Ownership) Planning and Infrastructure Renters’ Rights Sustainable Aviation Fuel Sentencing Water (Special Measures) Media Reports and essays Podcasts Blog Civil liberties Climate Change Ecology and animal protection Lords reform and PR National insecurity Other issues About Jenny Appointments A Day in the Life Biography In the News Jenny’s priorities Lords Diary Picture gallery Media Jenny’s media officer can be contacted by emailing wingrovei@parliament.uk Click here to sign up for our Green Peer’s irregular email newsletters Jenny is an experienced and outspoken speaker, her recent contributions to the House of Lords can be viewed here and her older constributions are here Jenny’s legendary battles with London Mayor Boris Johnson livened up debates at the Greater London Assembly – see her Assembly YouTube channel for some highlights She has also spoken at length about her experience of being on the police’s domestic extremist database Share this: Share on X (Opens in new window) X Share on Facebook (Opens in new window) Facebook Like Loading... Latest posts A Swift win The Armenian Genocide Tax the rich Crime and Policing Bill Report Stage Day 6 Birmingham City Council and Unite: Refuse Workers’ Pay Facebook Facebook A vote for @TheGreenParty is never wasted. 1) Every Green vote at a General Election gives us a tiny amount of money towards paying for a Parliamentary office with staff to help us 2) Every Green vote is an indicator to the other parties that the environment is important. — Jenny Jones (@GreenJennyJones) September 17, 2023 Join the Green Party Promoted by Chris Williams on behalf of The Green Party, both at PO Box 78066, London, SE16 9GQ Contact Us Email: wilsonc@parliament.uk Write to: Baroness Jones of MOULSECOOMB, House of Lords, SW1A 0PW Support Our Work DONATE NOW Create a website or blog at WordPress.com Subscribe Subscribed Baroness Jones of Moulsecoomb Join 50 other subscribers Sign me up Already have a WordPress.com account?
